description: 빌드 에러 수정 + 4개 대형 컴포넌트(MealPlanHistory, MealPlanner, SystemSettings, MenuDatabase)를 500줄 이하로 분리. 성능 최적화 + 커스텀 훅 테스트 추가.

userStories.title: Dashboard TypeScript 빌드 에러 수정
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the build to succeed so that CI/CD pipeline and deployment work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard.tsx:690 Recharts BarChart onClick 핸들러 타입 수정
userStories.notes: DONE: BarChart onClick 핸들러에 typeof name === 'string' 가드 적용. tsc 0에러, build 성공, vitest 98/98 통과.

userStories.title: MealPlanHistory 인라인 서브컴포넌트를 별도 파일로 추출
userStories.description: As a developer, I want MealPlanHistory's 6 inline components extracted to separate files so that each file has a single responsibility.
acceptanceCriteria: 모든 import 경로 정확, 순환 참조 없음
userStories.notes: DONE: 6개 인라인 컴포넌트 + 공유 상수/유틸을 components/history/로 추출. historyConstants.ts, MenuItemRow.tsx, MergedTableCell.tsx, HistoryTableCell.tsx, SwapModal.tsx, ActionModal.tsx, CommentModal.tsx, index.ts 생성. MealPlanHistory.tsx 2,136→1,484줄. tsc 0에러, build 성공, vitest 98/98 통과.

userStories.title: MealPlanHistory 커스텀 훅 추출
userStories.description: As a developer, I want MealPlanHistory's complex state logic extracted into custom hooks so that the main component focuses on rendering only.
acceptanceCriteria: hooks/useHistoryReview.ts 추출 (reviewFilter, reviewStatusMap, selectedReview, 코멘트 관리)
userStories.notes: DONE: 3개 커스텀 훅(useHistoryNavigation 68줄, useHistoryReview 150줄, useHistoryEdit 178줄) + HistoryPlanTable + HistoryProductionTable + historyExports 추출. MealPlanHistory.tsx 1,484→499줄. tsc 0에러, build 성공, vitest 98/98 통과.

userStories.title: MealPlanner 서브컴포넌트 및 훅 추출
userStories.description: As a developer, I want MealPlanner split into focused sub-components and hooks so that each piece is independently testable.
userStories.notes: DONE: plannerConstants.ts(42줄), GenerationPanel.tsx(122줄), PlanDisplay.tsx(404줄), PlanSwapModal.tsx(333줄), usePlanGeneration.ts(219줄), usePlanState.ts(241줄) 추출. MealPlanner.tsx 1,262→246줄. tsc 0에러, build 성공, vitest 98/98 통과.

userStories.title: SystemSettings 섹션별 서브컴포넌트 추출
userStories.description: As a developer, I want SystemSettings' 7 sections extracted into individual components so that each setting panel is independently editable.
userStories.notes: DONE: settingsConstants.ts(96줄), useSettingsState.ts(383줄), AlgorithmSection(36줄), IntegrationSection(217줄), PolicySection(6줄), ShipmentSection(80줄), IngredientColorSection(183줄), ProductionLimitSection(128줄), TargetTagSection(186줄) 추출. SystemSettings.tsx 1,234→175줄. tsc 0에러, build 성공, vitest 98/98 통과.

userStories.title: MenuDatabase 훅 추출 및 컴포넌트 분리
userStories.description: As a developer, I want MenuDatabase's filtering/sorting/pagination logic extracted into hooks and UI split into sub-components.
acceptanceCriteria: useMemo로 filteredItems, sortedItems, stats 메모이제이션 유지
userStories.notes: DONE: menuConstants.ts(32줄), useMenuFilters.ts(419줄), MenuToolbar.tsx(174줄), MenuRow.tsx(268줄), index.ts(2줄) 추출. MenuDatabase.tsx 1,142→189줄. tsc 0에러, build 성공, vitest 98/98 통과.

userStories.title: 성능 최적화 (useMemo / useCallback / React.memo)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unnecessary re-renders eliminated by applying proper memoization across refactored components.
acceptanceCriteria: MealPlanner: 식단 생성 결과 useMemo 캐싱
MealPlanHistory: filteredPlans, 리뷰 맵 useMemo 메모이제이션
이벤트 핸들러 useCallback 적용 (자식에 props로 전달되는 함수)
React.memo로 순수 서브컴포넌트 래핑 (MenuItemRow, MenuRow 등)
userStories.notes: DONE: React.memo 적용(MenuRow, MenuToolbar, MenuItemRow). useCallback 적용(useMenuFilters: handleSort, handleUpdateItem, toggleSelectItem, toggleSelectAll, handleTagToggle, handleAddNewTag, handleAgeGroupToggle, handleLaunchDateChange). History/Planner 훅은 이미 useCallback 적용 완료. useMemo는 US-002~006에서 이미 전수 적용. tsc 0에러, build 성공, vitest 98/98 통과.

userStories.title: 추출된 커스텀 훅 단위 테스트 추가
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for all extracted custom hooks so that refactored logic has regression protection.
userStories.notes: DONE: 7개 테스트 파일 생성 (33개 신규 테스트). useHistoryNavigation(6), useHistoryReview(4), useHistoryEdit(4), usePlanGeneration(4), usePlanState(3), useMenuFilters(6), useSettingsState(6). 전체 131/131 통과 (기존 98 + 신규 33).

userStories.title: 최종 검증 및 파일 크기 확인
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a final verification that all refactoring goals are met.
acceptanceCriteria: npx vitest run 전부 통과 (기존 98개 + 신규 21개+)
userStories.notes: DONE: MealPlanHistory 546→493줄(export 핸들러→historyExports), useMenuFilters 576→462줄(handleAutoClassify+handleCleanup→menuActions.ts). 4대 컴포넌트: MealPlanHistory(493), MealPlanner(246), SystemSettings(179), MenuDatabase(200). 모든 신규 파일 500줄 이하. tsc 0에러, build 성공, vitest 131/131 통과.
